input.headline: Black Friday deals for him that will make the perfect present

raw.headline: Black Friday deals for him that will make the perfect present

winner: He got a gift from the Black Friday sales—his wife’s patience. It was marked down 40%.

candidates.text: Why did the man buy a ladder on Black Friday? Because he heard the deals were *to die* for!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'to die for' are clever and specific to the Black Friday context, with a surprising twist."}

candidates.text: Why did Santa’s gift list have a red line through every item? Because he read the fine print and realized "Black Friday" was just code for "We’ll charge you more later.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on Black Friday, specific to the headline, concise, and uses a familiar holiday figure with a clever punchline."}

candidates.text: I told my husband I wanted a gift that would truly represent him—he said he’d prefer one he could give to himself on Black Friday.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific scenario, concise and natural humor"}

candidates.text: He got a gift from the Black Friday sales—his wife’s patience. It was marked down 40%.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific scenario, concise and funny with a clever play on 'marked down'"}

candidates.text: Why did the man get kicked out of Black Friday shopping? Because he kept saying "I'll just take half off!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on 'half off,' but it lacks specificity and the setup could be more surprising or refined for maximum humor impact."}
